_comment: ClawShow eSign (Standalone PDF signing — use case 2 only). Config-only project for the SaaS Promo Template. Build: python3 projects/templates/saas-promo/build.py clawshow-esign --out clawshow-esign-v2

problem.headline: Still emailing PDFs?
problem.subtitle: Print, sign, scan, resend — contracts shouldn't be this slow.

solution.headline: Sign it with ClawShow.
solution.subtitle: Standalone PDF e-signatures for any business — no integration required.

workflow.headline: Upload. Send. Sign.
workflow.subtitle: Add a PDF, enter the signer's email, ClawShow sends a secure link.

security.headline: AES eIDAS ready.
security.subtitle: 6-digit OTP, timestamp, SHA-256 fingerprint, full audit trail.

benefits.headline: Close deals faster.
benefits.subtitle: Sign anywhere, on any device — in minutes, not days.
